cvText: Grzegorz Witek — PHP Laravel Developer Summary Experienced php laravel developer with 4 years in SaaS. Most recently at LiveChat, leading initiatives for a team of 5 building chat routing service using Laravel, PHP 8, MySQL, Redis, PHPUnit. Experience LiveChat | PHP Laravel Developer | 2020–Present - Delivered chat routing service with Laravel, PHP 8, MySQL, Redis, PHPUnit. - Collaborated with a team of 5 to ship features used by thousands of users. - Improved reliability, performance, and developer experience across services. - Introduced automation, monitoring, and quality gates in CI/CD. - Worked with facts embedded in CV: Laravel, LiveChat, PHP 8, team of 5, MySQL, Redis, PHPUnit. Earlier roles Built internal platforms, integrated third-party APIs, and supported production systems in SaaS companies. Led migrations, refactors, and on-call rotations while maintaining high service levels. Education MSc Computer Science, Warsaw University of Technology Additional notes Throughout my career I have partnered closely with product managers, designers, and stakeholders to deliver reliable software in fast-moving environments. I value clear communication, pragmatic architecture decisions, and measurable outcomes. I regularly mentor junior engineers, facilitate code reviews, and contribute to engineering guidelines. I am comfortable working in cross-functional squads, participating in incident response, and translating business goals into technical roadmaps. I have experience with agile ceremonies, backlog refinement, and production support. I focus on observability, automated testing, and incremental delivery. I enjoy learning new tools when they solve real problems and I document decisions so teams can maintain systems confidently after launch. In previous roles I improved deployment frequency, reduced defect rates, and helped teams adopt better engineering practices. I am motivated by ownership, craftsmanship, and building products that users trust every day. jobOffer: We are hiring a PHP Laravel Developer to join our SaaS product team. You will work on chat routing service and collaborate with engineers using Laravel, PHP 8, MySQL, Redis, PHPUnit. We expect hands-on experience with Laravel, LiveChat, and modern delivery practices. You will partner with a team of 5 squads, participate in architecture discussions, and improve reliability of customer-facing services. Bonus if you have led migrations, mentored teammates, or contributed to platform standards. We offer hybrid work, competitive compensation, and opportunities to grow into technical leadership while staying close to code.
